sql: WITH yearly_month AS (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t.date)::int AS year, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM t.date)::int AS month_of_year, COUNT(*) AS tx_count FROM trans AS t WHERE t.date >= DATE '1994-01-01' AND t.date < DATE '1999-01-01' GROUP BY 1, 2), seasonal AS (SELECT month_of_year, AVG(tx_count)::numeric AS avg_tx_count, MIN(tx_count) AS min_year_count, MAX(tx_count) AS max_year_count, STDDEV_SAMP(tx_count) / NULLIF(AVG(tx_count), 0) AS coefficient_of_variation FROM yearly_month GROUP BY month_of_year) SELECT month_of_year, avg_tx_count, min_year_count, max_year_count, coefficient_of_variation, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY avg_tx_count DESC) AS high_month_rank, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY avg_tx_count ASC) AS low_month_rank, avg_tx_count - MIN(avg_tx_count) OVER () AS gap_vs_lowest_avg FROM seasonal ORDER BY month_of_year;
